zh.lifeSummary: 當Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan於1407年1月1日出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan56歲，母親Elsbeth Ferch Thomas31歲。她於1419年與Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在威爾士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾享年93歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan于1407年1月1日出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan56岁，母亲Elsbeth Ferch Thomas31岁。她于1419年与Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在威尔士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾享年93岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gethin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gethin, perhaps a soft-mutated form of cethin ‘dusky, swarthy’.

variants.name: Getting
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Gutyn, a pet form of Gruffudd (see Griffith ), mainly found in north Wales.
German: very rare variant of Gettig or Götting (see Goetting ) and, in North America, also an altered form of the latter.

nameMeanings.name: Efa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of several Anglicized forms of the Gaelic name Eithne . In the case of Queen Victoria's granddaughter Princess Ena (Victoria Eugénie Julia Ena,  1887–1969 ) it had a different origin: it was a misreading by the minister who baptized her off a handwritten note of the originally intended name   Eva .  In England, the name is remembered principally as that of the fearsome  Ena Sharples  in the television soap opera Coronation Street.  See also  Ina .

variants.name: Eithne
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from eithne ‘kernel’, which was used as a term of praise in bardic poetry. St Eithne was a daughter of King Laoghaire and one of St Patrick's first converts.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan was born on 1 January 1407, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan, was 56 and her mother, Elsbeth Ferch Thomas, was 31. She married Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn in 1419, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1500, in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 93, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan est née le 1 janvier 1407, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Elsbeth Ferch Thomas, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn en 1419, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterrée à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan am 1. Januar 1407 in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan 56 und ihre Mutter Elsbeth Ferch Thomas 31. Sie hat 1419 in Wales, United Kingdom Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan è nata il il 1 gennaio 1407 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Elsbeth Ferch Thomas, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn nel 1419, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolta a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychanが1407年1月1日にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuanは56歳，母Elsbeth Ferch Thomasは31歳であった。1419年にイギリスウェールズでSir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にウェールズグラモーガンラディルで93歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan(이)가 1407년 1월 1일 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elsbeth Ferch Thomas(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 웨일스에서 Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn em 1419, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan родилась 1 января 1407 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Elsbeth Ferch Thomas, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn в 1419 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 93 лет и была похоронена в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Efa Llewelyn verch Gethin Vychan nació el 1 de enero de 1407, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Ieuan Vychan Ap Ieuan, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Elsbeth Ferch Thomas, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir Morgan  Ap Llewelyn,  of Radyr Meisgyn en 1419, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1500, en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultada en Gales, Reino Unido.
